# @lumiarq/generator

Template and token generation engine for adapter-driven artifacts.

## What it does

- Resolves templates from packs/adapters
- Fills token placeholders for generated artifacts
- Writes generated files with generation metadata
- Exposes template resolution APIs for tooling

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @lumiarq/generator
```

## Contributing

1. Add tests for template resolution and token expansion.
2. Keep generated output deterministic for equal input.
3. Run `pnpm --filter @lumiarq/generator test typecheck build`.
